hero.subtitle: Discover the most extraordinary destinations with Azure Horizon. Experience world-class service and unforgettable journeys curated just for you.

featured.title: Featured Collections
featured.subtitle: Handpicked experiences representing the pinnacle of luxury travel.
featured.empty: There are no tours to display yet. Please check back later.
featured.error: Couldn't load tours. Please try again later.

philosophy.title: Journeys Designed With Intention.
philosophy.desc: We shape every itinerary around the texture of a place: where you stay, who guides you, what you see before the crowds arrive, and which quiet moments are worth protecting.
philosophy.note: A well-made journey should feel effortless to the traveler and deeply considered behind the scenes.
philosophy.accommodationDesc: Boutique stays, villas, and resorts selected for character, comfort, and setting.
philosophy.conciergeDesc: Guides and hosts who add context, timing, and rare local access.
philosophy.tailoredDesc: Balanced days that leave room for discovery instead of rushing through a checklist.

conciergeApp.desc: Speak with our experts or use our AI for immediate, personalized itinerary assistance.
conciergeApp.header: Meet Your Personal AI Travel Concierge.
conciergeApp.subheader: Welcome to Azure Horizon. Where would you like to escape to next?
conciergeApp.inputPlaceholder: Ask about tours, budgets, or bookings...
conciergeApp.disclaimer: Azure AI uses your tour data when available. Always verify dates and prices before booking.
conciergeApp.prompt4: Where should I travel this month?
conciergeApp.aiGreeting: Hello, I am your Azure Horizon travel assistant. I can find suitable tours, suggest itineraries, and check your bookings. Where would you like to start?
conciergeApp.aiResponse: Kyoto is exquisite in the spring. I have curated a selection of private villas and exclusive garden access for you. Here is a proposed itinerary:
conciergeApp.tourDesc: Private Zen garden tours, Kaiseki dining with a local historian, and exclusive tea ceremonies.
conciergeApp.noHistory: No conversations yet. Press New and send your first message to start saving history.
conciergeApp.rateLimitError: You are sending messages too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
conciergeApp.connectionError: Unable to connect to the AI assistant. Please try again later.
